Configuration settings, macros, and header files for Apache Mynewt and NimBLE on Pebble OS and nRF52.

## Folders
- **[cc2564x](cc2564x/README.md)**: Configuration settings and macros for the Apache Mynewt project.
- **[console](console/README.md)**: Defines a macro for logging formatted messages using the system logging module.
- **[nimble](nimble/README.md)**: Header files for NimBLE port to Pebble OS, defining structures, logging, and hardware interrupt functions.
- **[nrf52](nrf52/README.md)**: Configuration settings and macros for the Apache Mynewt system on the nRF52 platform.
